messages.message:
Compilation Skipped: Use of incompatible library

This API returns functions which cannot be memoized without leading to stale UI. To prevent this, by default React Compiler will skip memoizing this component/hook. However, you may see issues if values from this API are passed to other components/hooks that are memoized.

/Users/m-ac/Projects/dongphugia/src/app/admin/(dashboard)/products/product-form.tsx:173:24
  171 |     })
  172 |
> 173 |     const categoryId = form.watch('category_id')
      |                        ^^^^ React Hook Form's `useForm()` API returns a `watch()` function which cannot be memoized safely.
  174 |     const subcategoryId = form.watch('subcategory_id')
  175 |     const currentPrice = form.watch('price')
  176 |     const currentOriginalPrice = form.watch('original_price')
